title: Program Associate
description: Raytheon is seeking a Program Associate to support defense and security programs. You'll coordinate program activities, manage documentation, and support project execution. Work onsite in Detroit for a global aerospace and defense leader.
responsibilities: Coordinate program activities and track schedule performance
Support program meetings and status reporting
Communicate with internal and external stakeholders
Assist with compliance and audit support activities

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Business, Engineering, or related field

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
